questions.question: Explain the role of HDFS in an IoT data analytics architecture. (3 marks)
expectedPoints: It acts as a data lake for historical IoT data
It is fault-tolerant due to data replication across nodes

questions.question: Compare and contrast batch processing with MapReduce and real-time processing with a tool like Apache Storm for IoT applications. Discuss the typical use cases for each. (10 marks)
expectedPoints: Definition of Batch Processing: Processing large volumes of stored data in scheduled jobs (high latency, high throughput).
IoT Use Case for Batch: Long-term trend analysis, model training on historical data, daily aggregation reports.
Definition of Real-time Processing: Processing data events as they arrive (low latency, continuous operation).
IoT Use Case for Real-time: Live dashboarding, immediate anomaly detection, real-time alerting.
Contrast: Latency (hours vs. milliseconds), data scope (all data vs. current window), purpose (deep analysis vs. immediate insight).
Conclusion: They are complementary; many systems use both (Lambda Architecture).
